label: Policies for information security
summary: Organization shall define, approve, and communicate an information security policy.
source_license: ISO standard — referenced for mapping purposes only. Full text requires ISO subscription.

label: Access control
summary: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and assets shall be established and implemented.
source_license: ISO standard — referenced for mapping purposes only.

label: Identity management
summary: Full life cycle of identities shall be managed — provisioning, review, and revocation.
source_license: ISO standard — referenced for mapping purposes only.

label: Authentication information
summary: Allocation and management of authentication information shall be controlled by a formal process.
source_license: ISO standard — referenced for mapping purposes only.

label: Secure authentication
summary: Secure authentication technologies and procedures shall be implemented based on information access restrictions.
source_license: ISO standard — referenced for mapping purposes only.

label: Management of technical vulnerabilities
summary: Information about technical vulnerabilities of systems shall be obtained and appropriate measures taken.
source_license: ISO standard — referenced for mapping purposes only.
